title: Iron Smelters
description: Adds faster Furnaces, Blast Furnaces and Smokers!
body:
Iron-Smelters adds a new set of Furnaces, Blast Furnaces and Smokers made out of metals like Copper, Iron, Gold, Diamond, and even Obsidian!

![Image of a copper, iron, gold, diamond, and obsidian furnace / blast furnace / smoker with upgrade items above them](https://i.blamejared.com/5WUD0.png)

Each type smelts items faster than the previous tier and faster than the Vanilla smelters!

The smelting speed of each type can be configured in the config.

There are also upgrade items, letting you upgrade from one type to another without having to replace it!


This mod was heavily inspired by [Iron Chests by CPW](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/iron-chests) be sure to check it out as well!


If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via **[![Patreon logo](https://i.imgur.com/CAJuExT.png) Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/jaredlll08)**.
